pr.title: fix(deps): bump cryptography from 46.0.6 to 46.0.7 (closes #154)
pr.body:
### SUMMARY

Bumps `cryptography` from 46.0.6 to 46.0.7 to fix **CVE-2026-39892** ([GHSA-p423-j2cm-9vmq](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p423-j2cm-9vmq)) — a medium-severity buffer overflow vulnerability when non-contiguous buffers are passed to APIs.

**Files changed:**
- `pyproject.toml` — updated lower bound from `>=46.0.6` to `>=46.0.7`
- `requirements/base.in` — updated lower bound from `>=46.0.6` to `>=46.0.7`
- `requirements/base.txt` — pinned version updated from `46.0.6` to `46.0.7`
- `requirements/development.txt` — pinned version updated from `46.0.6` to `46.0.7`

### BEFORE/AFTER SCREENSHOTS OR ANIMATED GIF
N/A — dependency-only change.

### TESTING INSTRUCTIONS
1. `pip install -r requirements/base.txt` — verify cryptography 46.0.7 installs
2. `python -c "import cryptography; print(cryptography.__version__)"` — should print `46.0.7`
3. `pytest tests/unit_tests/ -x -q` — all tests pass

**Unit test output (`pytest tests/unit_tests/ -x -q`):**
```
6909 passed, 4 skipped in 392.66s (0:06:32)
```

One pre-existing failure (`test_per_tile_spinner_timeout_logs_warning_and_continues`) was confirmed on master — it's a `PlaywrightTimeout` constructor issue unrelated to cryptography.

**Integration tests (`SUPERSET_TESTENV=true pytest tests/integration_tests/ -x -q --timeout=120`):**

Docker services (db, redis) were started via `docker compose -f docker-compose-non-dev.yml up -d db redis`. Database migrations were applied with `superset db upgrade`. Integration tests fail immediately with:
```
FAILED tests/integration_tests/access_tests.py::test_get_user_id[alpha-5] - assert None == 5
1 failed, 1 passed in 0.32s
```

This failure was **confirmed pre-existing on master** — the same test fails identically on the `master` branch. The integration test suite requires a fully bootstrapped environment with pre-populated test users (`alpha`, `gamma`, etc.), which is normally set up by CI infrastructure. This is unrelated to the cryptography version bump.

Note: `pip install -e ".[development]"` fails with a pre-existing `sqlglot` version conflict between `apache-superset` (requires `sqlglot>=30.8.0,<31`) and `apache-superset-core` (requires `sqlglot>=28.10.0,<29`). Dependencies were installed from requirements files directly.

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
- [x] Has associated issue: Fixes #154
- [ ] Required feature flags:
- [ ] Changes UI
- [ ] Includes DB Migration
- [ ] Introduces new feature or API
- [ ] Removes existing feature or API

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/053269889bd0489bb6a378f96b79c62b
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
